metadata.description: Official Korfix platform plugins for Claude Code: miniapp development and AI assistant for business data queries.

plugins.name: korfix-devkit
plugins.description: Develop Korfix marketplace miniapps end-to-end: scaffold, code, validate, package, deploy. Includes 2 agents, 7 skills, bundled docs, optional MCP.

plugins.name: korfix-assistant
plugins.description: AI assistant for Korfix ERP business queries via MCP: reports, summaries, record search, create/update — all through natural language.
